title: Federal Electoral District Statistics (FEDS) - Canada.ca
content:
## Federal Electoral District Statistics (FEDS)
The Federal Electoral District Statistics publication has been discontinued. For similar statistics broken down by geographical area, please consult the Individual Tax Statistics by Forward Sortation Area publication.
The Federal Electoral District Statistics (FEDS) tables present individual income tax data based on geographic area and are available by province, territory, and all Canada. The data in the tables are derived from information reported on personal income tax returns and tax-free savings account records that were processed for the tax year two years prior to the year of publication.
- 2019 Edition (2017 tax year)
- 2018 Edition (2016 tax year)
- 2017 Edition (2015 tax year)
- 2016 Edition (2014 tax year)

### Give feedback about this page
